headline: 暑期档预热，新片蓄势待发
headlineEn: Summer Movie Season Heats Up with New Releases
summary: 今日无新片上映，但本周《痴迷》《福尔摩斯小姐3》等热门影片领跑，多部新片如《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》即将登场。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but top trends include 'Obsession' and 'Enola Holmes 3', with upcoming titles like 'Spider-Man: Freshman Year'.

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》本周热度不减
industryHighlights.en: The Devil Wears Prada 2 remains hot this week

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》定档引发期待
industryHighlights.en: Spider-Man: Freshman Year release date sparks excitement

industryHighlights.text: 《海洋奇缘：启航》即将扬帆起航
industryHighlights.en: Moana: Set Sail is about to launch
